A: Good morning. _______ _______ _______ _______?
B: Yes – I'd like to book some tickets for the city tour, please.
A: Certainly. _______ _______ _______ _______ _______ _______ _______ _______?
B: Just two adults – my friend and myself.
A: _______ _______ _______ _______ _______ _______? We have one starting in ten minutes.
B: Actually, we want to go this afternoon. _______ _______ _______ _______ _______ _______ _______ _______?
A: No, but there's one at 3:15.
B: That will be fine. _______ _______ _______ _______ _______?
A: An hour. Here are your tickets. That's £10, please.
B: Here you are.
A: Thank you. Enjoy the tour!
